form.builder_text: Organize farm details and palm types clearly so everything is ready for follow-up.

sections.basic_info_text: Enter the farm name and location clearly so it is easy to access later.
sections.palm_types_text: Add palm types and the number of trees for each type. Each card represents one clear block of farm data.

delete.title: Delete farm
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the farm {name}?

list.hero_text: Track your farms and organize palm types and tree counts from one cleaner place.
list.search_placeholder: Search by farm name or location
list.empty_message: Start by adding your first farm to organize data and follow-up easily.

edit.title: Edit farm details
edit.subtitle: Update farm details and manage palm types

show.title: Farm details
show.subtitle: View farm details and follow its tasks
show.hero_text: A clean and clear view of the farm and all weekly tasks in one place.
show.summary_text: All key farm information in one clean place.
show.palm_types_text: Quick cards that show each palm type, tree count, and age.
show.tasks_text: Each month appears as its own section, and inside it you will find week cards. Click any week to open a separate page for its recorded days.
show.week_without_days: No recorded days for this week
show.no_review: No technical review has been added yet.
show.no_recommendations: No technical recommendations have been added yet.
show.no_reports_title: No tasks are linked to this farm yet
show.no_reports_message: Once monthly tasks are added, they will appear here in an organized way, and each week will have its own page for the recorded days.
show.week_page_subtitle: Follow the recorded days inside this week
show.week_days_text: Each card here represents one recorded day inside this week, with all fertilization, irrigation, and spraying details.
show.no_days_message: When days are recorded for this week, they will appear here automatically as clear and simple cards.
